basic_details.job_title: Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant News Editor and News Reader/ Anchor Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant News Editor and News Reader/Anchor (Hindi)
basic_details.short_information: Prasar Bharati Assistant News Editor and News Reader/Anchor (Hindi) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Prasar Bharati. Applications are invited for the posts of Assistant News Editor and News Reader/Anchor (Hindi) through the Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from recognized university, Diploma/Degree in Journalism, Proficiency in Hindi, Minimum 3 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Contractual Assistant News Editor: Graduate from a recognized university; Diploma/Degree in Journalism from a recognized university; Minimum 3 years of experience in a newspaper or news/broadcasting/news organization. Contractual News Reader/Anchor (Hindi): Graduate from a recognized university; Proficiency in Hindi language; Good voice suitable for broadcasting and camera-friendly face; Pure pronunciation, voice modulation ability and action; Knowledge of regional/national/international current affairs; Knowledge of names and details of regional/national/international important persons.

salary_details.details: Contractual Assistant News Editor: Rs. 2400/- per day/shift Contractual News Reader/Anchor (Hindi): Rs. 1875/- per day/shift (Rs. 2400/- per day/shift after three years)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Prasar Bharati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://prasarbharati.gov.in/pbvacancies.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Prasar Bharati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Contractual Assistant News Editor: Graduate from a recognized university; Diploma/Degree in Journalism from a recognized university; Minimum 3 years of experience in a newspaper or news/broadcasting/news organization. Contractual News Reader/Anchor (Hindi): Graduate from a recognized university; Proficiency in Hindi language; Good voice suitable for broadcasting and camera-friendly face; Pure pronunciation, voice modulation ability and action; Knowledge of regional/national/international current affairs; Knowledge of names and details of regional/national/international important persons.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Contractual Assistant News Editor: Rs. 2400/- per day/shift Contractual News Reader/Anchor (Hindi): Rs. 1875/- per day/shift (Rs. 2400/- per day/shift after three years)

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Prasar Bharati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://prasarbharati.gov.in/pbvacancies. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Prasar Bharati recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Prasar Bharati recruitment is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years for all the posts announced by Prasar Bharati.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university. For Assistant News Editor, a Diploma/Degree in Journalism and 3 years of experience are required. For News Reader/Anchor, proficiency in Hindi, good voice, and knowledge of current affairs are essential.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for Prasar Bharati recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by Prasar Bharati.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Contractual Assistant News Editor is Rs. 2400/- per day/shift. For Contractual News Reader/Anchor (Hindi), it is Rs. 1875/- per day/shift, which can increase to Rs. 2400/- after three years.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these Prasar Bharati jobs?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual, offering a chance to work with Prasar Bharati on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Prasar Bharati official website, the link for which is provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any vacancies for specific categories like UR, OBC, SC, ST?
faq.answer: The provided data indicates that the total number of vacancies is 0. Therefore, specific vacancy counts for UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, or PWD are not applicable at this time.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The details regarding the selection process are not explicitly mentioned in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection methodology.
